description: Garage 自带的 HarnessFlow 工程工作流 family pack：28 个 hf-* skills + 1 个 using-hf-workflow public entry，共 29 个 skill。Per-skill self-contained layout。Reverse-sync 自 hujianbest/harness-flow main（对齐上游 v0.6.0 pre-release 能力集：含 hf-browser-testing / hf-context-mesh / hf-gap-analyzer / hf-release / hf-ultrawork / hf-wisdom-notebook 等；上游已移除 hf-bug-patterns）。本仓库 garage-side 增量 = hf-workflow-router/SKILL.md step 3.5 (F014 Workflow Recall) 与 references/recall-integration.md。
